title: Cyberbullying Investigation - Coordinated Harassment Report
executive_summary: The evidence shows a coordinated harassment pattern beginning in private chat and escalating to public social media amplification.
forensic_conclusion: Evidence supports a high-severity cyberbullying investigation with preserved chat logs, screenshots, platform activity, and corroborating notification records.
key_findings: Multiple senders coordinated against one victim
Public shaming and repost behavior observed
